title: [help]
text: [help] The [help] section of the initialization file specifies the files to be used when online help is requested by the help ProcScript statement from a Uniface application, or within displayed messages. [help] default=myapp.hlp messages=appmessages.hlp htmlhelp=true Copy Related Links Implementing Online Help How you call online help from Uniface depends on the format of the help file.
